The person's very high openness and low agreeableness, combined with a baseline already opposed, make the status-threat priming irrelevant to this already-rejected item, so no movement occurs.

This person's low openness and high conscientiousness, combined with a dismissive-avoidant attachment and low political efficacy, make them resistant to participatory reforms, but the operation's threat salience and embedding pressure narrative design, targeting their high authoritarian submission and dangerous worldview, can erode their baseline opposition by about 75 points.
